# Coding Style Guide

LionHeart Group Coding Style Guide

## Env

- [Environment](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env)
- [Visual Studio Code](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env/vscode)
- [Git](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env/git)
- [Node.js (Volta)](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env/node)
- [pnpm (corepack)](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env/pnpm)
- [Docker](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env/docker)
- [Agentic Coding (Beta)](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env/agentic-coding)
- [Dnsmasq](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env/dnsmasq)
  - [VirtualBox](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env/deprecated/virtualbox)
  - [Watchman](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/env/deprecated/watchman)


## Fegg

  - [Controller](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/basic/controller)

      - [Validation::maxbyte](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/maxbyte)
      - [Validation::length](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/length)
      - [Validation::maxlength](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/maxlength)
      - [Validation::minlength](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/minlength)
      - [Validation::hankaku](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/hankaku)
      - [Validation::katakana](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/katakana)
      - [Validation::setError](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/seterror)
      - [Validation::setErrorMessage](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/seterrormessage)
      - [Validation::isError](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/iserror)
      - [Validation::getErrorMessage](https://lionheart-group.github.io/coding-style-guide/docs/fegg/library/validation/methods/geterrormessage)
